case_title: BUSH VIRGEAN VS BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL TRUST & SAVINGS ASSN. et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSH VIRGEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL TRUST & SAVINGS ASSN. C/O GUTIERREZ E. MR. LEGAL ACCT ADMINISTRATOR $1,877.34 PRINCIPAL, $12.72 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,890.06 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
